Verified Reviews

Get a Free Estimate

What Your Neighbors Have to Say

Read More Reviews →
M
Maria G.

5 Star Electric upgraded my electrical panel in my 1940s cottage near Coronado. They were prompt, professional, and explained everything clearly. I feel much safer now and can finally run my AC without tripping breakers! Highly recommend.

D
David S.

We hired 5 Star Electric to install new recessed lighting in our kitchen in La Jolla. The electrician was skilled and efficient. There was a small hiccup with one of the fixtures, but they quickly resolved it to our satisfaction. Overall, we're very happy with the results.

J
Jessica L.

I had a faulty outlet in my home office that was sparking. 5 Star Electric came out quickly and repaired it safely. The electrician was friendly and professional, and the price was reasonable. Very grateful for their quick response!

R
Robert K.

Great experience with 5 Star Electric! They installed two new ceiling fans in my bedrooms in my house in Hillcrest. The installation was quick and clean, and the fans look great. I'm already noticing a difference in the air circulation.

5 Star Electric San Diego — Certified Professionals

Our team brings certified expertise and years of experience to every electrician project. We stand behind our work with comprehensive warranties and a commitment to quality.

More About Us →

The 5 Star Electric San Diego Way

Our proven process ensures every project is completed with precision, transparency, and care.

1

Consultation

We start with a thorough, no-obligation assessment. Our certified team evaluates your needs and provides a detailed report with recommendations.

2

Plan & Prepare

We work with you to determine the best approach for your specific electrician needs. Our experts ensure the right plan for quality results.

3

Get It Done

Our skilled team gets to work with precision and efficiency. We maintain a clean, organized environment and keep you informed every step of the way.

4

Quality Check

Before we consider any job complete, our team performs a comprehensive quality review. We verify every detail meets our exacting standards.

5

Wrap Up

Transparent pricing with no surprises. You only pay when you're 100% satisfied with the work. We offer flexible options to make the process seamless.

Proudly Serving San Diego & Beyond

As a locally owned and operated company, we're proud to serve customers throughout San Diego, CA and the surrounding communities. Our team brings local expertise and dedication to every project.

Let's Get Started →

Frequently Asked Questions

Get answers to the most common questions about our electrician services.

How do I know if I need an electrical panel upgrade?

Common signs include frequent tripping of breakers, flickering lights, and difficulty running multiple appliances simultaneously. If your panel is over 25 years old, it's also a good idea to have it inspected.

How long does an electrical panel upgrade take?

Most panel upgrades can be completed in a single day, minimizing disruption to your home or business. The exact timeline depends on the complexity of the project and local inspection schedules.

What type of electrical panel should I choose?

The best panel for your needs depends on your current and future power demands. We'll assess your situation and recommend the appropriate panel size and type, ensuring it meets your specific requirements.

Built on San Diego Values

Get a free quote today for your electrical project!
